checks.detail: task.toml sets [agent] user = "agent" for non-root agent execution.
Dockerfile creates non-root agent, locks /tests, hands /app and /solution to agent, and installs strace.
reasons: present: useradd --create-home agent
present: chown -R agent:agent /app
present: mkdir /solution + chown agent:agent /solution
present: mkdir /tests + chmod 700 /tests
present: strace installed (apt-get) for verifier auditing
present: cmark reference installed in /opt/verifier_tools as root-only (chmod -R go-rwx)
note: uid not explicitly pinned to 1000 but useradd on python:3.11-slim assigns 1000 by default; test.sh chmod go-rx pattern is consistent with non-root agent

checks.detail: test.sh locks /logs/verifier first then wipes, re-locks /tests, runs all agent-code phases as `su agent` inside strace -f with timeout, and computes reward outside strace.
reasons: present: chmod 700 /logs/verifier BEFORE rm -rf (lines 54-55)
present: re-lock /tests (chmod 700 + go-rx on subdirs) after Harbor upload resets perms
present: env sanitisation (unsets LD_PRELOAD, LD_LIBRARY_PATH, PYTHONPATH, CC, CFLAGS, etc.)
present: exit 0 always (fail_with exits 0; final exit 0)
present: fail_with writes 0.0 fallback via compute_reward.py --fail
present: build, correctness run, and perf runs all wrapped in `strace -f -e trace=clone,fork,vfork,execve,openat` + `timeout` + `su agent -s /bin/bash -c "env -i ..."`
present: reward_tamper_in() greps strace logs for openat write of reward.{txt,json} after every strace'd phase
present: converter_execve_in() greps for cmark/pandoc/python/node/perl/ruby execve in md2html runs
present: pkill -9 -u agent before verification to clear pre-existing agent procs
present: compute_reward.py runs OUTSIDE strace as root and does not import or read /app
present: no chown root:root on /logs paths (only relax_reward_perms widens reads after scoring)
present: oracle-marker gate uses random token from [solution.env], unreadable by agent

checks.detail: runs_agent_code — verifier compiles the agent's C sources and executes the resulting md2html binary, so strace + su agent are mandatory and present.
reasons: verifier invokes make/gcc on /app/workspace/*.c
verifier execs the produced /app/workspace/md2html for correctness and perf phases
strace -f wraps every agent-code execution path; scoring (compute_reward.py) runs outside strace
